commands_executed.command: docker compose exec -T api sh -c "PYTHONPATH=/app python /temp/audit/bug_audits/xebex_smart_connect/_xebex_smart_connect_audit.py"

root_cause.xebex_display_clean: clean_product_name() strips XEBEX from normalized_name/display_name when brand=XEBEX — works (0 SKUs with XEBEX after cleanup on variant name).
root_cause.xebex_master_leak: explicit_one_per_sku uses variant_primary_name_raw (pre-cleanup PDF text) for master_name via _row_primary_product_name(), bypassing clean_product_name.
root_cause.category_prefix_leak: Same path retains subcategory tokens (Remo, Cinta, Bici, Ski…) in master_name while variant display strips them.
root_cause.smart_connect: No spec key; parenthetical/suffix tokens remain in names with 6 spelling variants; not extracted to boolean feature.

category_prefix_in_primary_skus.note: Includes REM002-005, CIN001-002, SKI*, etc. — master_name carries subcategory prefix

master_name_issues.issue: Remo prefix + smart text in master

systemic_xebex_removal.answer: Yes, with bounded fix: apply clean_product_name (or normalized_name) to explicit_one_per_sku master_name when commercial brand is resolved.
systemic_xebex_removal.false_positive_risk: Low — tests already cover leading XEBEX, inline Xebex, Cinta Xebex; REPUESTO leading XEBEX becomes product descriptor only.
systemic_xebex_removal.do_not_merge_with_brand_field: Brand stays on variant/master entity; only display/master text cleanup.

smart_connect_representation.answer: Hybrid post-MVP: boolean spec smart_connect (si/no) for feature variants; keep literal 'SMART CONECT' in REPUESTO console product names (product identity, not feature flag).
smart_connect_representation.mvp_acceptable: Parenthetical in name is commercially distinguishable for 12 SKUs.

classifications.description: master_name uses uncleaned variant_primary_name_raw; XEBEX/category tokens leak into master while display_name is clean.
Smart Connect feature variants not modeled as spec; 6 spelling variants in free text.
classifications.mvp_pages_impact: Pages 3, 4, 5 — does not block import or distinguish variants incorrectly

classifications.description: PDF typos (conect vs connect, Bicileta) preserved in source names.

mvp_impact.pages_already_accepted: P1/P2/P3/P4 not invalidated — importable, SKUs/prices/categories correct; master display inconsistency is cosmetic/PIM presentation
mvp_impact.regression_risk_if_fixed: Pages 11-14 unaffected (no XEBEX CARDIO); fix must target explicit_one_per_sku master naming only

recommendation.systemic_fix_proposal: Agent 2 Plan Mode: align explicit_one_per_sku master_name with normalized_name (or run clean_product_name on primary); add smart_connect boolean spec for CARDIO feature parentheticals; exclude REPUESTO console SKUs from spec extraction.
recommendation.no_fix_now: MVP import gate not blocked; variant display names acceptable; brand entity correct

recommended_agent: Agent 2 (Plan Mode then Agent mode if approved)
recommended_prompt: IMPORT-FDL-NAME-CLEANUP-MASTER-ALIGN + optional SMART-CONNECT-SPEC for CARDIO XEBEX pages 3-6
